briefs.title: Proposed: Statutory Right of Way at 4111 Ledger Avenue, Burnaby — Council to Consider
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider approving a proposed statutory right of way — a legal strip of land that gives the city specific access or use rights — over a portion of the property at 4111 Ledger Avenue.
briefs.action_required: If you own or operate near 4111 Ledger Avenue, review the sketches and watch for the council vote.
